name: Nix Vyllana
description:
A deadly moon-elf as vicious and twisted as the elven courts that raised her.

Nix Vyllana is a nightmare incarnate, a shadowy harbinger of pain and death. Bred by the infamous Vyllana family as a living instrument of destruction, she has elevated their ruthless teachings into an art form, embracing her role as a fanatical weapon with unrelenting fervor. No job is too heinous, no act too cruel, no atrocity too unspeakable for her to execute, so long as it furthers her family's sinister ambitions. She revels in the chaos she creates, finding twisted joy in every drop of blood spilled in their name. To her, mercy is weakness, and hesitation is betrayal. Nix thrives in the fear she inspires, her presence alone enough to turn the bravest hearts to ice.

Dark Fantasy Music
creator: Sweston
